Table	Create Table
business_plans	CREATE TABLE `business_plans` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `entityType` enum('llc','corporation','trust','nonprofit_508','nonprofit_501c3','collective','sole_proprietorship') NOT NULL,
  `entityName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `houseId` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdByUserId` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `missionStatement` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `visionStatement` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `organizationDescription` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `yearFounded` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `productsServices` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `uniqueValueProposition` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `targetMarket` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `marketSize` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `competitiveAdvantage` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `teamSize` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `teamDescription` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `keyPersonnel` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `startupCosts` decimal(14,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `monthlyOperatingCosts` decimal(14,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `projectedRevenueYear1` decimal(14,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `projectedRevenueYear2` decimal(14,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `projectedRevenueYear3` decimal(14,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `breakEvenTimeline` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `fundingNeeded` decimal(14,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `fundingPurpose` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `fundingSources` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `shortTermGoals` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `longTermGoals` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `milestones` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `socialImpact` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `communityBenefit` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('draft','in_progress','completed','approved','archived') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `completedAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `approvedAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `approvedBy` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `version` int(11) DEFAULT '1',
  `previousVersionId` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_bin AUTO_INCREMENT=30001
